auth.label: API Key
auth.description: HTML/CSS to Image API Key used as the HTTP Basic password.

extraFields.label: User ID
extraFields.description: HTML/CSS to Image User ID used as the HTTP Basic username.

actions.name: create_batch_images
actions.description: Create up to 25 HTML/CSS to Image images in one batch using shared default options and per-image variations.

css.description: CSS to render with HTML snippets or inject into URL screenshots.

google_fonts.description: Google Fonts to load, such as Roboto or multiple font families separated by a pipe.

selector.description: A CSS selector for an element to crop the generated image to.

ms_delay.description: The fixed delay in milliseconds before generating the image.

max_wait_ms.description: The maximum time in milliseconds to wait before taking the screenshot.

device_scale.description: The Chrome device scale factor. Higher values increase resolution and file size.

render_when_ready.description: Whether page JavaScript must call ScreenshotReady() before the image is generated.

full_screen.description: Whether to generate an image of the entire page height.

block_consent_banners.description: Whether to automatically hide common cookie consent banners and popups.

viewport_width.description: The Chrome viewport width in pixels. Set with viewport_height to disable automatic cropping.

viewport_height.description: The Chrome viewport height in pixels. Set with viewport_width to disable automatic cropping.

viewport_mobile.description: Whether Chrome should emulate a mobile viewport.

viewport_landscape.description: Whether Chrome should emulate a landscape mobile viewport.

viewport_touch.description: Whether Chrome should emulate touch input support.

color_scheme.description: The Chrome color scheme to use while rendering websites that support prefers-color-scheme.

timezone.description: The IANA timezone identifier used while rendering the image.

disable_twemoji.description: Whether to use native emoji fonts instead of Twemoji.

proxy_id.description: The configured HTML/CSS to Image dashboard proxy ID for outbound requests.

default_options.description: Default image creation options applied to every batch variation.

html.description: The HTML snippet or complete webpage markup to render.

url.description: The public webpage URL to screenshot.

css.description: CSS to render with HTML snippets or inject into URL screenshots.

google_fonts.description: Google Fonts to load, such as Roboto or multiple font families separated by a pipe.

selector.description: A CSS selector for an element to crop the generated image to.

ms_delay.description: The fixed delay in milliseconds before generating the image.

max_wait_ms.description: The maximum time in milliseconds to wait before taking the screenshot.

device_scale.description: The Chrome device scale factor. Higher values increase resolution and file size.

render_when_ready.description: Whether page JavaScript must call ScreenshotReady() before the image is generated.

full_screen.description: Whether to generate an image of the entire page height.

block_consent_banners.description: Whether to automatically hide common cookie consent banners and popups.

viewport_width.description: The Chrome viewport width in pixels. Set with viewport_height to disable automatic cropping.

viewport_height.description: The Chrome viewport height in pixels. Set with viewport_width to disable automatic cropping.

viewport_mobile.description: Whether Chrome should emulate a mobile viewport.

viewport_landscape.description: Whether Chrome should emulate a landscape mobile viewport.

viewport_touch.description: Whether Chrome should emulate touch input support.

color_scheme.description: The Chrome color scheme to use while rendering websites that support prefers-color-scheme.

timezone.description: The IANA timezone identifier used while rendering the image.

disable_twemoji.description: Whether to use native emoji fonts instead of Twemoji.

proxy_id.description: The configured HTML/CSS to Image dashboard proxy ID for outbound requests.

items.description: One image variation for batch creation. Provide exactly one of html or url.

variations.description: The image variations to create, up to 25.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a batch of images.

items.description: One image created by HTML/CSS to Image.

images.description: The images created by the batch request.

actions.name: create_image
actions.description: Create an image from either raw HTML/CSS or a public webpage URL with HTML/CSS to Image.

html.description: The HTML snippet or complete webpage markup to render.

url.description: The public webpage URL to screenshot. This overrides html upstream.

css.description: CSS to render with HTML snippets or inject into URL screenshots.

google_fonts.description: Google Fonts to load, such as Roboto or multiple font families separated by a pipe.

selector.description: A CSS selector for an element to crop the generated image to.

ms_delay.description: The fixed delay in milliseconds before generating the image.

max_wait_ms.description: The maximum time in milliseconds to wait before taking the screenshot.

device_scale.description: The Chrome device scale factor. Higher values increase resolution and file size.

render_when_ready.description: Whether page JavaScript must call ScreenshotReady() before the image is generated.

full_screen.description: Whether to generate an image of the entire page height.

block_consent_banners.description: Whether to automatically hide common cookie consent banners and popups.

viewport_width.description: The Chrome viewport width in pixels. Set with viewport_height to disable automatic cropping.

viewport_height.description: The Chrome viewport height in pixels. Set with viewport_width to disable automatic cropping.

viewport_mobile.description: Whether Chrome should emulate a mobile viewport.

viewport_landscape.description: Whether Chrome should emulate a landscape mobile viewport.

viewport_touch.description: Whether Chrome should emulate touch input support.

color_scheme.description: The Chrome color scheme to use while rendering websites that support prefers-color-scheme.

timezone.description: The IANA timezone identifier used while rendering the image.

disable_twemoji.description: Whether to use native emoji fonts instead of Twemoji.

proxy_id.description: The configured HTML/CSS to Image dashboard proxy ID for outbound requests.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating one image with HTML/CSS to Image. Provide exactly one of html or url.

actions.name: delete_batch_images
actions.description: Delete multiple generated images from HTML/CSS to Image in one request.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting multiple images.

accepted.description: Whether HTML/CSS to Image accepted the batch delete request.

ids.description: The image identifiers submitted for deletion.

actions.name: delete_image
actions.description: Delete one generated image from HTML/CSS to Image and clear its CDN cache.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for deleting one image.

accepted.description: Whether HTML/CSS to Image accepted the delete request.

image_id.description: The image identifier that was deleted.

actions.name: get_usage
actions.description: Retrieve HTML/CSS to Image usage counts by hour, day, month, and billing period.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving account usage.

additionalProperties.description: The number of images created during this interval.

hour.description: Usage counts keyed by ISO timestamp for one rollup interval.

additionalProperties.description: The number of images created during this interval.

day.description: Usage counts keyed by ISO timestamp for one rollup interval.

additionalProperties.description: The number of images created during this interval.

month.description: Usage counts keyed by ISO timestamp for one rollup interval.

data.description: Usage counts grouped by rollup interval.

total_images.description: The number of images created in this billing period.

items.description: One billing-period usage summary returned by HTML/CSS to Image.

per_billing_period.description: Usage summaries for recent billing periods.

outputSchema.description: The account usage returned by HTML/CSS to Image.
